title: senecio belenensis
intro: Senecio belenensis, also known as Belen Groundsel, is a plant species in the dandelion family that is native to the Canary Islands. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Senecio belenensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized in traditional medicine.
